response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in customer-facing technical discovery — key requirements for a Staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven full-stack expertise across TypeScript, cloud (AWS), and scalable systems
Active open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
concerns: Career gap since Oct 2025 and no recent AI/GenAI production delivery documented
No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in experience
Limited evidence of leading technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders

key_factors.factor: Lack of GenAI Production Track Record
No Vector DB or RAG Experience
